hooks.command: missing=""; which pdftoppm >/dev/null 2>&1 || missing="${missing:+$missing, }poppler (brew install poppler)"; which node >/dev/null 2>&1 || missing="${missing:+$missing, }Node.js (brew install node)"; which python3 >/dev/null 2>&1 || missing="${missing:+$missing, }Python 3 (brew install python)"; if [ -n "$missing" ]; then printf '{"result": "warn", "message": "Talk Builder: missing system dependencies: %s"}' "$missing"; fi

python3 -c 'import pptx, yaml, lxml' 2>/dev/null || python3 -m pip install --quiet --user -r "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/assets/scripts/requirements.txt" 2>/dev/null || printf '{"result": "warn", "message": "Talk Builder: failed to install Python dependencies (python-pptx, PyYAML, lxml). Run manually: pip3 install -r assets/scripts/requirements.txt"}'
